## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `bun run typecheck` and `bun test` locally and they pass.
- [ ] If I added/changed a guide, `bun run db:seed:guides` validates it.
- [ ] My change respects the safety rules in CONTRIBUTING.md (no probing, no
      unverified sending, no form impersonation, no credential storage).
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits.
